description: Request URI targets a cloud metadata endpoint (AWS 169.254.169.254, GCP metadata.google.internal, K8s kubernetes.default.svc, etc.). These are credential-leak primitives — MUST reject regardless of declared digest.
rationale: Cloud metadata endpoints are explicitly forbidden by the contract. A schema-fetch primitive used to leak instance credentials would be a critical multi-tenant compromise. Reject by both hostname denylist AND resolved-IP denylist (defense in depth).
